description: response-driven backoff coordinator
name: Fleet Backoff Coordinator

description: F6 fleet backup orchestrator. Every 6h snapshots configured sources (SQLite, git, files, directories), encrypts with age (multiple recipients for key rotation), pushes to URI-shaped destination (initial: local:///opt/backups; future: storage-box:// rsync over SSH). Verifies every write by decrypt+tar-diff round-trip; mismatch = FAILED run, retention prune skipped. Per-instance SQLite audit log enforces "never delete what we didn't create" invariant. 7-daily / 4-weekly / 12-monthly retention. POST /restore always dry-run; actual restore is operator-driven with offline age identity (daemon never holds the decrypting key).
name: Fleet Backup
trl_ceiling_reason: Verify-after-write in production is byte-equality on the encrypted blob (daemon holds no decrypting identity, by design). Full encrypt+decrypt+tar-diff verify only runs in tests + when an operator opts a verifying identity into the daemon. Lift to 7+ would either issue the daemon a dedicated verify-only identity or require every restore retrieval to verify before exposing bytes.

description: canonical sensitive-data redactor
name: Fleet Body Redactor

description: per-program scan-cost cap (atomic check-and-insert)
name: Fleet Budget Tracker

description: per-request call trace collector (Speedscope flamegraph output)
name: Fleet Call Tracer

description: G9 fleet capability aggregator. Walks the catalog and probes /openapi + /health + /version + /selftest on every kind=container entry in parallel; surfaces one aggregate at /capabilities.json (5-min in-process TTL, served stale during refresh). Plain net/http outbound (ADR-0024). Failed sub-probes recorded in errors[]; we never drop a service silently. Summary rollup (container_reachable, openapi_published, selftest_green/red/not_implemented) for one-glance fleet status.
name: Fleet Capabilities

description: MIME/charset/encoding normalizer (5MB cap)
name: Fleet Content Normalizer

description: structured diff: http_response|json|html|asset_set|text
name: Fleet Diff Engine

description: Prometheus http_sd endpoint emitting one target per fleet container service. Refreshes services.json every 60s and probes /metrics via host.docker.internal.
name: Fleet Discovery

description: Hetzner DNS reconciler. Targets the Hetzner Cloud API (api.hetzner.cloud/v1, Bearer auth, RRSet-oriented) — the canonical DNS surface that supersedes the deprecated dns.hetzner.com Console API. Reads services-registry/services.json, diffs against actual zone state, applies the delta. Pulls the Cloud API token from go-fleet-secrets. 30-min ticker. Extras never auto-deleted.
name: Fleet Dns Sync
trl_ceiling_reason: Per-zone instance; ceiling lifts with multi-zone via parallel deployments.

description: per-program event timeline aggregator (6 siblings)
name: Fleet Engagement Timeline

description: WAF/soft-404/CDN-noise classifier
name: Fleet Fingerprint Cache

description: Grafana dashboards for the fleet metrics hub. Anonymous viewer-only; admin/signup disabled; keystore-gated at the gateway.
name: Fleet Grafana

description: Fleet graph collector. Aggregates service-to-service call observations emitted by go-common/graph into 1m/1h/1d buckets in SQLite. Serves /events (ingest), /graph + /summary (queries), /service/<slug>/{callers,calls}, /lookup/<slug> (powers graph.Lookup), /drift (declared-vs-observed). Mirror of services-registry refreshes every 5min.
name: Fleet Graph
trl_ceiling_reason: Single-node SQLite. Lifts to 8 once paired with periodic snapshot backup and a multi-collector consensus design for high-RPS callers.

description: HAR 1.2 evidence formatter
name: Fleet Har Builder

description: F7 disk pressure eviction + F9 memory leak detector. Dockerhost guardian daemon: every 5 min samples fs usage and runs `docker image prune --filter until=168h` + truncates oversized non-rotated /var/log/*.log; every 1 h samples container RSS via `docker stats` and fits a linear regression — flags containers whose slope > 50 MB/h AND R² > 0.7.
name: Fleet Host Guard
trl_ceiling_reason: Bounded by docker-stats RSS fidelity (cgroup memory.usage_in_bytes includes page cache). Lift to 7+ would require parsing /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/{slice}/memory.stat to separate RSS from cache.

description: versioned attack-payload corpus (125 payloads, 12 classes)
name: Fleet Payload Corpus

description: cross-app + cross-origin display identity (nickname + name + avatar) for the mesh-* P2P fleet — L2 tier of fleetPersona in mesh-common
name: Fleet Persona

description: 1x1 transparent-GIF pageview beacon for the mesh-* static-Pages fleet
name: Fleet Pixel

description: redacted PoC curl emitter (bash -n parse-gated)
name: Fleet Poc Curl

description: Pre-deploy validation. POST /preflight {repo, secrets?} runs every required check in parallel: registry presence, DNS resolution, port collision, required secrets metadata. Returns 200 (all green) or 424 (any red) with detailed checklist. Read-only.
name: Fleet Preflight
trl_ceiling_reason: Each new check is one goroutine. Lift bound is breadth of checks.

description: composite-scored findings priority ranker
name: Fleet Priority Queue

description: Prometheus instance scraping each fleet container host_port/metrics via the fleet-discovery http_sd endpoint. Runs in host network mode, --web.listen-address=:18203.

description: 2-of-3 DNS resolver quorum
name: Fleet Resolver Quorum

description: internal-only sandbox vulnerable apps (10 endpoints)

description: JSON Schema catalog + validator (8 baseline schemas)

description: Encrypted secrets vault. Holds infrastructure tokens (Hetzner DNS, GitHub PAT, SMTP, platform API keys). NaCl secretbox at rest, per-secret nonce, scoped reads via gateway-injected X-Auth-User against consumers allowlist, separate X-Admin-Token for writes. Audit log per access.
name: Fleet Secrets

description: Fleet graph visualizer. Public surface at /public shows sanitised (caller -> target) counts only — no latencies, no internal hosts. Frontend uses vis-network from CDN, vanilla JS, no build step.

description: Persistent agent memory for the pentest fleet. POST /snapshot upserts the 'where I left off' state for an autonomous agent; POST /journal appends events. SQLite (WAL). Closes the gap that makes every Claude conversation start at zero.
name: Pentest Agent State
trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling lifts once orchestrator + payoff-tracker route through it end-to-end and the loop has survived a week of unattended operation.

description: Source of truth for every known asset per program. Recon services upsert; continuous-monitor diffs daily to fire scans only on NEW assets. The compounding-revenue substrate of the fleet.
name: Pentest Asset Inventory
trl_ceiling_reason: Single-node SQLite. Fine until ~1M assets per program; sharding by program or Postgres later.

description: Wildcard scope expansion: composes cert-transparency + subfinder + scope-guard to expand a program wildcard scope into a concrete in-scope subdomain list.
name: Pentest Asset Scope Resolver
trl_ceiling_reason: Depends on upstream fleet services and live program scope data quality.

description: CORS exploitation chain validator. Cross-references a CORS misconfig finding with go-pentest-takeover-checker (attacker-controllable siblings) AND probes target for data-bearing endpoints. Classifies real_severity end-to-end: critical / high / medium / low / informational. Renders a working PoC HTML page when chain elements present.
name: Pentest Attack Chainer

description: Append-only audit log for the pentest fleet. Every scan-start / scope-denied / finding-submitted gets recorded. Legal floor + CYA.
name: Pentest Audit Log

description: Pentest fleet service
name: Pentest Authz Matrix

description: Given a domain, returns which bug-bounty programs include it in scope (sorted by max payout). Embedded seed of ~10 well-known programs (GitHub, GitLab, Shopify, PayPal, Anthropic, Google, Microsoft, Tesla, Uber, X).
name: Pentest Bounty Scope Checker
trl_ceiling_reason: Production freshness depends on continuously updated program feeds.

description: crt.sh wrapper with 24h SQLite cache. Returns SAN-derived subdomains or full cert records (issuer/dates/SANs).
name: Pentest Cert Transparency
trl_ceiling_reason: Add Censys + Google CT in parallel for redundancy.

description: Background syncer for ProjectDiscovery Chaos public dataset. SQLite-backed (modernc.org/sqlite, CGo-free) cache of subdomains keyed by root_domain; daily refresh; O(log N) lookups; zero target-network traffic.
name: Pentest Chaos Sync
trl_ceiling_reason: Delta-tracking and program ranking needed for 7+.

description: Encode/decode + JWT segment decoder. 11 formats (base64 std/url/raw, base32, hex, url, html, gzip, zlib, json-string); alg=none/path-traversable-kid flags on JWT.
name: Pentest Codec

description: Daily cron-style scheduler that diffs asset-inventory per program and enqueues scan jobs only for NEW assets. Turns one-shot recon into a subscription — money compounds with the asset universe, not manpower.
name: Pentest Continuous Monitor
trl_ceiling_reason: Bounded by job-queue throughput. Sequential per-program scheduler keeps the reasoning simple.

description: Active CORS-misconfig prober. 5 attacker-Origin probes (reflection, null-origin, suffix-bypass, pre-subdomain, case-fold). Reflection+Allow-Credentials=high.
name: Pentest Cors Misconfig Prober

description: CVSS 3.1 base score calculator. Pure-Go FIRST.org spec implementation. Takes a vector, returns base/severity/impact/exploitability.
name: Pentest Cvss
trl_ceiling_reason: CVSS 4.0 support pushes to 9.

description: Semantic dedup of findings. Normalizes query-param order, UUIDs in path, timestamps, whitespace in body, then sha256s. Stops one XSS reported by 4 scanners from looking like 4 dupes.
name: Pentest Dedup Fingerprint
trl_ceiling_reason: Normalization rule corpus grows with bug-class variety; current 6 rules handle the common cases.

description: CPE -> NVD JSON 2.0 + CISA KEV cross-flag. Per-request fetch (no local cache yet). Composes with go-pentest-httpx tech detection.
name: Pentest Dependency Cve
trl_ceiling_reason: TRL 7 with local CVE feed primitive caching NVD/GHSA delta-updates.

description: Probes 12 disclosure-policy paths and classifies bounty/VDP/safe-harbor/unknown/none. Extracts Contact/PGP from security.txt and detects platform hints (HackerOne/Bugcrowd/Intigriti/YesWeHack/Synack).
name: Pentest Disclosure Policy Finder
trl_ceiling_reason: Add /security anchor crawl + submit-button scraping.

description: Gate between possible-finding and submit-bot. Runs deterministic confirmation per vuln class: SSRF via OOB callback, XSS via marker reflection, IDOR via session-stripped re-fetch, JWT alg-none, open-redirect, subdomain-takeover.
name: Pentest Exploit Verifier
trl_ceiling_reason: Each verifier is a thin recipe — lifts as verifier coverage grows. Bounded by OOB collector quality for blind classes.

description: Shodan-style mmh3 favicon hash with known-tech lookup (~15 seeds: Tomcat, Spring Boot, Jenkins, Grafana, Jupyter, phpMyAdmin, GitLab, FortiNet, F5, etc.).
name: Pentest Favicon Hash

description: Auto-grades raw findings into submit_ready / needs_review / drop using 8 rules (missing fields, fingerprint-dupe, scope-deny, noise-class, confidence floor, severity promote, evidence-present, verified-class). Reasons array surfaces every decision.
name: Pentest Finding Triage
trl_ceiling_reason: Lift bound is rule-corpus size. Adding ML or LLM-based triage would push the ceiling but break the pure-rule explainability.

description: Central deduplicated findings store for the pentest fleet. SQLite-backed (pure Go modernc); collapses same finding from multiple scanners via dedup_key with seen_count.
name: Pentest Findings Store
trl_ceiling_reason: Single-node SQLite is fine until ~1M findings; horizontal shard or Postgres later.

description: GitHub Search API dorking for leaked credentials: 31 curated patterns (AWS keys, .env, private keys, Slack/Stripe/PAT tokens, kubeconfig, npm/Docker creds). Rate-limit aware; pairs with go-pentest-trufflehog for verification.
name: Pentest Github Dorks
trl_ceiling_reason: GitHub Search has no regex; semantic dedup + verifier-loop integration cap the climb at 6.

description: Captures + reproduces HTTP request/response pairs as bug-bounty evidence. Generates canonical curl PoC, replays for diff, imports raw HTTP from Burp. Uses go-common safehttp (SSRF-safe).
name: Pentest Http Replay
trl_ceiling_reason: Single-node SQLite. Fine for evidence retention at typical bug-bounty scale; lifts when paired with object storage for large bodies.

description: One HTTP fingerprint per request: status, title, server, TLS cert summary, ~25 tech-detection signatures. Parallel batch with worker cap. Replaces chaining tech-stack + security-headers + cdn-detector.
name: Pentest Httpx
trl_ceiling_reason: Wrap wappalyzergo for full 3000+ fingerprint DB.

description: Durable workflow queue. POST jobs, workers /claim → /complete or /fail. Crash-resilient via SQLite WAL; expired leases auto-requeue every 15s with exponential backoff. Backbone for orchestrator + continuous-monitor + every long-running scan.
name: Pentest Job Queue
trl_ceiling_reason: Single-node SQLite. Fine up to ~10k jobs/sec; graduates to NATS JetStream or Postgres skip-locked beyond that.

description: Curated registry: which bug-bounty programs PAY for credential-leak disclosures, broken down by leak class (own_employee / shared_secret / customer_cred / canary). Use BEFORE writing up a leaked-credential disclosure — most platforms treat customer-side leaks as goodwill-only; only Stripe / GitHub partner / AWS canary / GitLab pay per-leak. 25 programs seeded.
name: Pentest Leak Bounty Policy
trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling 7 with quarterly auto-refresh from each program's policy URL + admin /reload endpoint. Pure manual curation caps at 5 because policies drift faster than humans can re-audit at scale.

description: Multi-sink notification fanout for the pentest fleet (Telegram/Discord/Slack/email/webhook/ntfy/Matrix/Teams/etc.) via containrrr/shoutrrr.
name: Pentest Notify
trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling = shoutrrr sink count + HMAC webhook auth.

description: Nuclei wrapper: scope-guarded YAML-template scanner (cves/exposures/misconfigs/takeovers). Pre-flights every target through go-pentest-scope-guard; forwards findings to go-pentest-findings-store. Bundles nuclei binary in container.
name: Pentest Nuclei
trl_ceiling_reason: Pinned-binary wrapping; templates refresh cadence + concurrency stress-testing gate the climb to 7.

description: Out-of-band HTTP callback catcher for blind XSS/SSRF/RCE findings. Allocates short-lived tokens, public /c/{token} catch endpoint, authenticated polling API. v0.2 wraps projectdiscovery/interactsh for DNS exfil.
name: Pentest Oob Collector
trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling unlocked once projectdiscovery/interactsh is wrapped for DNS+SMTP exfil. HTTP half remains useful as simple-case catcher.

description: Master end-to-end pipeline. POST a campaign and the state machine drives scope→recon→scan→triage→verify→submit through every other go-pentest-* service. 30s ticker auto-advances. SUBMIT_DRY_RUN=1 by default — the unattended money loop.
name: Pentest Orchestrator
trl_ceiling_reason: Bounded by submit-bot's platform-API stability. Once submit-bot ships TRL 8, this trails one step behind at 7-8.

description: Serves payload corpora (XSS/SQLi/SSRF/SSTI/XXE/CRLF/NoSQLi/GraphQL/path-traversal) by class+variant. Random-sample API for taint fuzzing.
name: Pentest Payloads
trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling = PayloadsAllTheThings as submodule.

description: Self-evaluator. POST /predict captures what finding-triage said before submission; POST /outcome captures what the platform did with it (via triager-listener). GET /calibration returns per-rule precision + per-program ROI. Closes the learning loop.
name: Pentest Payoff Tracker
trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling lifts once at least ~20 real submissions have flowed through and /calibration is non-empty.

description: Global per-host token-bucket rate limiter. Every active prober calls POST /acquire {host, weight} before firing — prevents multiple scanners from collectively DDoS-ing a target.
name: Pentest Rate Coordinator
trl_ceiling_reason: In-process state — single instance. Multi-instance needs Redis (sethvargo/go-limiter has the backend ready).

description: Turns a structured Finding into a platform-ready markdown report. Ships HackerOne/Bugcrowd/Intigriti templates. Optional CVSS enrichment via go-pentest-cvss. Highest-leverage service in the fleet.
name: Pentest Report Templater
trl_ceiling_reason: Add org-specific templates + screenshot embed + direct HackerOne API submission.

description: Hard scope check before any active prober fires. POST /check {target, program_id} -> {allowed, reason, matched_by}. Matches hostname/wildcard/CIDR/regex; exclusions always win. Legal floor of the pentest fleet.
name: Pentest Scope Guard
trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling is whatever feeds it programs — once go-pentest-bounty-scope-checker exists, scope-guard is a CDN over its data.

description: Headless-Chromium screenshot evidence for pentest reports. POST /shot {url,viewport,before_js,after_js} → PNG + DOM hash + title + status. 24h SQLite cache keyed by sha256 of inputs.
name: Pentest Screenshot
trl_ceiling_reason: Bounded by Chromium-headless RAM (1 GiB shm) and the fact that one container is one Chromium instance.

description: Regex+entropy secret scanner. ~30 vendor rules (AWS, GitHub, GitLab, Slack, Stripe, Google, Twilio, SendGrid, Mailgun, Anthropic, OpenAI, HF, Discord, npm, JWT, RSA/EC/OpenSSH/PGP keys).
name: Pentest Secrets Scanner
trl_ceiling_reason: TRL 8 with verified-secret feature (call vendor API to confirm key is live).

description: Pentest fleet service
name: Pentest Session State

description: Pentest fleet service
name: Pentest Ssrf Prober

description: Multi-source passive subdomain enumeration: crt.sh (via our own cert-transparency), HackerTarget, AnubisDB, Wayback. Free sources only.
name: Pentest Subfinder
trl_ceiling_reason: Add Shodan/Censys/Chaos/SecurityTrails when keys configured.

description: Files findings to HackerOne / Bugcrowd / Intigriti via their APIs, or via security.txt email as fallback. Rate-limit + daily-cap aware. Dry-run mode for verification. The actual money step.
name: Pentest Submit Bot
trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling lifts to 8 once real H1/BC/Intigriti creds are verified end-to-end and the rendered-markdown shape is confirmed against the platforms' parsers.

description: Subdomain-takeover scanner. Resolves CNAME, probes HTTP, matches signatures from go-pentest-takeover-fingerprints. Severity none/possible/likely.
name: Pentest Takeover Checker

description: Subdomain takeover signature DB. 17 curated vendors (AWS S3, GitHub Pages, Heroku, Fastly, Shopify, Vercel, Netlify, Azure, Cargo, WordPress, Tumblr, Zendesk, Surge, Ghost, ReadMe, Intercom, Unbounce).
name: Pentest Takeover Fingerprints

description: Canonicalizes free-form pentest targets (URL/host/IP/CIDR). Returns kind, eTLD+1, private-IP flag. Foundation primitive every active prober calls before doing anything else.
name: Pentest Target Normalizer
trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling is whatever publicsuffix list covers; no external deps to break.

description: Inbound half of submit-bot. POST /watch registers a submitted bounty report; a 15-min ticker polls HackerOne / Bugcrowd / Intigriti and records state changes (new -> triaged -> duplicate/informative/n_a/resolved). Without it the fleet cannot learn its own duplicate rate or payoff per program.
name: Pentest Triager Listener
trl_ceiling_reason: Bounded by platform API stability — H1/BC/Intigriti reshape attributes regularly and there's no signed contract.

description: Trufflehog wrapper: scans repos/git/filesystem for VERIFIED secrets (--only-verified). 700+ detectors live-tested against providers. Upgrades go-pentest-secrets-scanner with verification.
name: Pentest Trufflehog
trl_ceiling_reason: Wraps upstream trufflehog binary; advancing requires custom concurrency control and deduplication.

description: HTTP equivalent of go-pentest-cli — single-domain pentest flow as REST API. /preflight, /recon, /findings, /report + /sessions for async scan with per-finding manual triage override. Pause/resume per session.
name: Pentest Walkthrough
trl_ceiling_reason: Same ceiling as orchestrator — bounded by submit-bot end-to-end verification.

description: Historical URL discovery via web.archive.org CDX. Returns every URL ever crawled with status + MIME + auto-flagged interesting extensions (.bak/.sql/.env/.zip).
name: Pentest Wayback Urls

description: Serves curated pentest wordlists (dirs, subdomains, params, fuzz) by category with SHA256 integrity. Random-sample API. Designed to grow via SecLists submodule.
name: Pentest Wordlists
trl_ceiling_reason: Ceiling = SecLists submodule contents.

description: Self-hosted Plausible Analytics (ghcr.io/plausible/community-edition). Third-party upstream container — its own docker-compose lives at /opt/services/plausible/ and is managed by hand (NOT by fleet-runner). Registered here so allocate-port and audit-port know host_port 18204 is claimed.
name: Plausible Analytics

description: Static scan for window.postMessage listeners missing origin checks (XS-Leak risk)
name: Postmessage

description: Static scan for prototype-pollution sink patterns (Object.assign, lodash.merge, deepmerge) in recovered JS bundles.
name: Proto Pollution
trl_ceiling_reason: Static-only without endpoint discovery; reaches TRL 7 once wired to api-extractor for auto-probe targets.

description: HTTP proxy with rotation (?url=)
name: Proxy (Go)

description: Python proxy (?url=)
name: Proxy (Python)

description: Routes to a random proxy backend (?url=)
name: Proxy (Random)

name: Search DuckDuckGo (Go)

description: Extract structured content from URL (?url=)
name: Read Content

name: Accent Coach

description: Static, anonymous live polling with CRDT sync, zk one-vote proofs, and local analytics.
name: Anon Conf Poll

description: A privacy-preserving browser artwork — phones read a sculpture tag and shift visuals/audio from local viewing patterns. No surveillance.
name: Audience Field Sculpture

description: Browser-based audio repair toolkit for noise removal, vocal isolation, and quick podcast/music cleanup.
name: Audio Repair Lab

description: Private browser-based EMDR-inspired audio journaling with local transcription, reflection prompts, and no trauma uploads.
name: Bilateral Memory Processing

description: Private, local-first voice reflection vault for retreats. Whisper + sentence-transformers + age + DuckDB + Markdown export, all in the browser.
name: Castle Archive Memory Vault

description: Static-first planner for plant ID, crop rotation, sun, soil, watering, frost, and harvest forecasts.
name: Complete Gardener Planner

description: A logical, reasonably standardized, but flexible project structure for doing and sharing data science work.
name: Cookiecutter Data Science

description: Live browser simulator for snowflake, dendrite, and coral-like crystal growth with WebGPU visuals and sonified physics.
name: Crystal Growth Simulator

description: Shared cursors and sticky notes on an infinite canvas. P2P over a self-hosted WebRTC mesh. GitHub-Pages-only, no backend.

name: Deep Searcher

description: Interactive WebGPU demo: click a fault to see and hear P-waves and S-waves propagate across terrain.
name: Earthquake Wave Propagation

description: Local-first elder care coordination for meds, appointments, insurance drafts, and emergency packets.

description: Interactive finite-group and symmetry explorer using WASM math, Three.js, and graph visualization.
name: Group Theory Visualizer

description: Local-first EPUB/PDF highlight review with semantic search and spaced repetition.
name: Highlight Recall

description: A browser audio lab for hearing live microphone input delayed, pitch-shifted, and spectrally transformed.
name: Implemment The Following Time Displaced Ears

description: Turn a kid’s drawing into a bedtime story narrated in a parent’s voice, entirely in the browser.
name: Little Voice Stories

description: Local-first grammar, spelling, style, and rewrite assistant for the browser with no draft data sent to servers.
name: Local Proofreader

description: Privacy-first AI email client with local mailbox indexing, semantic search, and assistive drafting.
name: Localhuman Mail

description: A private, gamified language tutor with local speech, review, grammar, and lesson generation.
name: Localingo

description: Peer-to-peer mesh: voice notes tied to a place. Scan a QR sticker on a bench, hear the last visitors. Audio lives only in browsers that have scanned.
name: Mesh Bench Archive

description: Peer-to-peer mesh: road-trip bingo. Per-phone unique 5x5 cards, shared claim space across the car. First to a line wins.
name: Mesh Carpool Bingo

description: Peer-to-peer mesh: phones pulse soft yellow in clock-synced unison for a swarm-of-fireflies effect on a night walk.

description: Peer-to-peer mesh: all phone flashlights strobe in single-millisecond sync to light a group photo from many angles at once.
name: Mesh Lightning Flash

description: Peer-to-peer Werewolf: phones are role cards assigned via cryptographic commit-reveal; no server ever learns who's the wolf.
name: Mesh Mafia

description: Peer-to-peer mesh: 4 phones become a polyrhythm grid, each playing a clock-synced subdivision of the same BPM.
name: Mesh Metronome

description: Peer-to-peer mesh: phones in a ring show each other's live camera feed — phone N's screen shows phone (N+1)'s view, creating a low-fi infinite mirror.
name: Mesh Mirror

description: Peer-to-peer mesh: 2-4 friends in different homes each point their camera at a view they like; every phone tiles all the others' feeds into one composite.
name: Mesh Shared Window

description: Peer-to-peer mesh: group meditation timer. Phones detect stillness via accelerometer and aggregate the count anonymously.
name: Mesh Silence Counter

description: Peer-to-peer mesh: each phone is one drum; 30 seconds of taps records a synced loop that replays on every phone.

description: Peer-to-peer mesh: arrange phones in a row; tap one and a ripple expands across all phones as if they were one continuous canvas.
name: Mesh Wave Canvas

description: Static-first academic writing platform for drafting, citations, literature review, figures, and submission-ready PDFs.
name: Numen

name: Openphoto Studio

description: Beautiful map posters from OpenStreetMap, generated in your browser. No backend, no API keys.
name: Osm Poster

name: Parse Address

description: Browser dashboard for the pentest fleet. Single-page HTML app (Tailwind CDN, vanilla JS) with tabs for Preflight, Programs, Recon, Scan, Findings, Report. Calls every passive scanner via the api_key in browser localStorage. Human-facing GUI for the same flow go-pentest-cli and go-pentest-walkthrough automate.
name: Pentest Dashboard
trl_ceiling_reason: Bounded by what the fleet exposes; active probing tools need auth + deploy before they can be surfaced safely.

description: Browser-first physical sticky-note Kanban that scans AprilTags and syncs board state to collaborators.
name: Physical Kanban Sync

description: Encrypted push-to-talk rooms in the browser. P2P audio mesh over a self-hosted WebRTC stack. GitHub-Pages-only, no backend.

description: Multilingual NLP pipeline for corpus analysis: tokenize, tag, parse, NER, embed, and cluster text.

description: A GitHub Pages-first bootstrap map for disciplined project setup.

name: React Data Grid

name: Read Later Curriculum

description: Private browser research workspace for clustering papers, finding gaps, drafting outlines, and exporting cited Word/LaTeX.
name: Research Flow

description: Local-first outliner with backlinks, graph search, semantic recall, and optional peer-to-peer sync.
name: Roamless Notes

description: Browser-based live room visuals that react to music, people, and synced nearby devices.
name: Room Vj

description: Browser-based Schlieren simulator for visualizing heat, sound, and gas density gradients with WebGPU and Three.js.
name: Schlieren Imaging Simulator

description: See OSM edits happen in real time.
name: Show Me The Way

name: Substance Sampler

description: AprilTag-anchored AR sticky notes. Print a marker, point your camera, shared notes appear. P2P over a self-hosted WebRTC mesh. No backend.
name: Tagboard

description: Client-side face and voice anonymizer for private browser-based video calls.
name: Trust No One Anonymizer

description: Drop documents in, extract text and metadata, OCR scans, detect entities, and convert outputs to Markdown, DOCX, or EPUB.
name: Universal Document Workbench

description: A static, offline-friendly planner for garden calendars, daily care, harvest logs, and next-year growing decisions.
name: Urban Farm Year

name: Vagus Reset Coach

description: vCard is a fully responsive personal portfolio website, responsive for all devices.
name: Vcard Personal Portfolio
